(17) Saturn Loss of wealth, separation from children,
illness of wife, heavy expenditure, death of elders, loss of ser-
vants, clothes etc., slovenliness and phlegmatic trouble.
(vii) Mercury Scabies, boils, jaundice, leprosy, foul gas,
pain in the stomach and hips, loss of land, ailments caused by the
three humours.
(viii) Ketu :—Loss of friends, quarrels with kinsmen and
family, danger from enemies, theft of money, loss of position,
illness of father and severe pain in the head and feet.

140 FUNDAMENTALS OF ASTROLOGY
(ix) Venus Headache, stomach-ache, piles, agriculture,
loss of house, wealth and com and sickness of wife and children.
Major lord, — Moon
(0 Moon Birth of a daughter, accession of white silk,
meeting of great Brahmins, mother's happiness, conjugal
happiness.
Mars Ailments caused by the vitiation of bile, blood
and fire, hardships, sufferings, trouble from enemies and thieves
and loss of wealth and honour.
